programme.title: The Gladiator
programme.desc: A homicidal maniac is on the loose in Los Angeles killing motorists at random with his death car After losing his brother Jeff to the twisted assassin known as Skull Rick Benton takes it upon himself to hunt down the reckless drivers that fill the streets at night Being a master mechanic Rick spends his time converting his pick-up truck into an armed and dangerous vehicle With speed to take on the fastest car and strength to make sure in a one-on-one situation he will be the only survivor The cops soon find out about the vigilante known only as the Gladiator and do all they can to catch him before his citizens arrests go one step too far

programme.title: Battle Beyond The Stars
programme.desc: Shad of Akir Richard Thomas recruits a space cowboy George Peppard and other warriors to defend his planet from a barbarians army

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Monsters
programme.desc: A man haunted by his doppelganger asks a white witch and single mother to help him raise a demon to defeat it before it takes him and her son

programme.title: Monsters
programme.desc: A charming devil forces a down-on-her-luck but principled suburbanite single mother to be his ghost writer and if his biography gets published hell get a better position in hell She tries to convert him

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: In this follow-up to the Prime Cut episode a group of recovering cannibals have a relapse and make the unfortunate decision to eat an intruder whos been contaminated with an alien disease

programme.title: Monsters
programme.desc: Monsters 1988 Top-rated S1E23 ∙ Mannikins of Horror Sat May 20 1989 In an Orwellian society a female doctor in an insane asylum tries to help her patient a former brilliant surgeon obsessed with giving life to his clay figurines before the asylum director deems him incurable and therefore expendable

programme.title: Monsters
programme.desc: A young man tries to destroy a beautiful witch whom he thinks has placed his mother under a deadly curse

programme.title: Great Battles Of The Great War -The Somme
programme.desc: The 1916 Somme offensive was one of the largest and bloodiest battles of the First World War 1914-18 The opening day of the attack 1 July 1916 saw the British Army sustain 57000 casualties the bloodiest day in its history

programme.title: Great Battles Of The Great War - Gallipoli
programme.desc: On 29 October 1914 two former German warships the Ottoman conducted the Black Sea raid in which they bombarded the Russian port of Odessa and sank several shipsthe Ottomans entered the war and began the Caucasus campaign against Russia The British briefly bombarded forts in Gallipoli invaded Mesopotamia and studied the possibility of forcing the Dardanelles

programme.title: The Long Shadow
programme.desc: Marking the centenary of World War One historian David Reynolds explores the enduring shadow the conflict has cast over Britain and Europe in the century that followed Travelling to locations across Europe from Slovenia to the Sudetenland Belfast to Berlin David Reynolds traces the war’s legacy arguing that it unleashed forces we still grapple with today This remarkable series also looks again at how the experience of war haunted the generation who lived through it in particular the soldiers who survived it – dynamic characters such as Benito Mussolini Eamon de Valera Philippe Petain James Ramsey MacDonald and Thomas Masaryk Reynolds examines how these men shaped the peace that followed war often in unpredictable ways

programme.title: Desert Generals
programme.desc: Britain would have lost her empire and the war in 1942 had Axis forces beaten the British army in the Middle East Tim Collins re-investigates Britain’s critical desert campaign and the controversial battle tactics needed to take on the unbeaten Panzer army in total war preventing Hitler from gaining Egypt Iraq and the oilfields Foreshadowing current world events this oil-rich region was crucial to the war effort These are the World War II battles that shaped the Middle East and created the world in which we live today

programme.title: The Underground War
programme.desc: A two-part documentary about networks of underground tunnels built on the front lines in the First World War During World War One a barbaric war was fought deep beneath the trenches in a maze of tunnels and dugouts over 10 metres underground

programme.title: Desert Generals
programme.desc: Britain would have lost her empire and the war in 1942 had Axis forces beaten the British army in the Middle East Tim Collins re-investigates Britain’s critical desert campaign and the controversial battle tactics needed to take on the unbeaten Panzer army in total war preventing Hitler from gaining Egypt Iraq and the oilfields Foreshadowing current world events this oil-rich region was crucial to the war effort These are the World War II battles that shaped the Middle East and created the world in which we live today

programme.title: The Long Shadow
programme.desc: Marking the centenary of World War One historian David Reynolds explores the enduring shadow the conflict has cast over Britain and Europe in the century that followed Travelling to locations across Europe from Slovenia to the Sudetenland Belfast to Berlin David Reynolds traces the war’s legacy arguing that it unleashed forces we still grapple with today This remarkable series also looks again at how the experience of war haunted the generation who lived through it in particular the soldiers who survived it – dynamic characters such as Benito Mussolini Eamon de Valera Philippe Petain James Ramsey MacDonald and Thomas Masaryk Reynolds examines how these men shaped the peace that followed war often in unpredictable ways

programme.title: The Long Shadow
programme.desc: Marking the centenary of World War One historian David Reynolds explores the enduring shadow the conflict has cast over Britain and Europe in the century that followed Travelling to locations across Europe from Slovenia to the Sudetenland Belfast to Berlin David Reynolds traces the war’s legacy arguing that it unleashed forces we still grapple with today This remarkable series also looks again at how the experience of war haunted the generation who lived through it in particular the soldiers who survived it – dynamic characters such as Benito Mussolini Eamon de Valera Philippe Petain James Ramsey MacDonald and Thomas Masaryk Reynolds examines how these men shaped the peace that followed war often in unpredictable ways

programme.title: Tales From the Crypt
programme.desc: Tales From the Crypt

programme.title: Tales From the Crypt
programme.desc: Tales From the Crypt

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Faded playwright Arthur Brown uses electronic equipment to record private chats of other people as inspiration for his work His subject Diane is having an affair with Carla Magnuson When Dianes husband finds out everyone is in danger

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Unethical psychiatrist Dr Peter Milne gets romantically involved with unstable Sara Kendal His manipulation of her mind and emotions makes her illness worsen When she cant tell dreams from reality he becomes her rages target

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric wounded by Alamo Joe is saved by a young boy fascinated by monsters werewolves in particular But things get hairy when Moms abusive boyfriend starts slapping her and her son around and Eric saves the day

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric locates Otto Renfield a crippled old sailor who knows Skorzeny and promises to help Eric find him But Renfield betrays Eric and traps him in the hold of his ship for Skorzeny

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: To apprehend a murderer who is supposedly killing in the name of God Nick must overcome his vampire fear of the cross

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A witch fights to gain a powerful occult symbol using a helpless Ryan in the process

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Hanks twin brother arrives and Greta enlists him to help bump off her new husband Meanwhile Gretas sister and her husband drop in for a surprise visit

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: The McCoys dig up a brontosaurus leg bone on their property Kate wants to donate the bone to a museum but Grampa would rather cash in on a roadside stand tourist attraction

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa wants to become the new Grand High Imperial Mummy of the Ancient and Loyal Order of the Mystic Nile

programme.title: Smart 507
programme.desc: Smart 507

programme.title: Smart 511
programme.desc: Smart 511

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJs truck is hijacked by three beautiful sisters They need BJs rig and his help in order to make a big moonshine run that will raise money for their ailing fathers operation

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur is all set to enjoy a weeks vacation relaxing at home but his plans are ruined when his overbearing Aunt Martha and her talking parrot unexpectedly drop by for a prolonged visit

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: While Mister Ed phones in racing tips to Pimlico Race Course the Posts and the Addisons play Find The Statue

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogans efforts to help a German baroness to escape are thwarted by Klink who has arranged for the transfer of a British prisoner who is senior to Colonel Hogan

programme.title: Hogans Hereos
programme.desc: When a British commando unit is captured before they can blow up a crucial German ammo dump Hogan and his men attempt to finish the job

programme.title: Mchale 327
programme.desc: Mchale 327

programme.title: Mchale 407
programme.desc: Mchale 407

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: In the first of the 3 part sea maneuvers Gomer sneaks a cat aboard a Navy ship unaware there is sensitive Petty Chief Officer who throws all Contraband overboard

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Part 2 of sea maneuvers has Pyle repeatedly goofing up Carters mission

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A Howell Industries stock collapse leaves the Howells broke The fellow castaways try to cheer them up and try to teach them how to live like the working class

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: While the castaways take precautions against a coming typhoon an accidental blow to the head causes Gilligans mouth to act as a radio receiver

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: A young woman Kathleen Lloyd working at Hart Industries becomes obsessed with her boss Jonathan and mimics Jennifers appearance to replace her

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Dick and Joanna renew their vows - sort of Stef is Maid of Honor and George is Best Man

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: The towns snow carnival is in danger because there is no snow In desperation they turn to the only men who guaranteed snow for the carnival Larry Darryl and Darryl

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: Defense budget cutbacks have Hollister targeted for possible shutdown MacGillis is put in charge of firing civilian staff

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways start disappearing one by one and when the remaining castaways discover that headhunters have not taken them Gilligan begins to think hes a Dr Jeckyll and Mr Hyde and has killed them all

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: Mitch Ryan and Griff investigate strange incidents in which two frozen 900-year-old Vikings arrive in Los Angeles from Iceland for thawing and they immediately come to life and restart their feud

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First Lou and Sonia make their way to a home in the hills to clean a germaphobe of his car Then its Matt and Froys big repo Having left the company to start their own they head out after a high-end exotic car from outside a mansion And finally Lou Lyndah and Lous cousin Rob drive out to a used car lot to pick up a few cars but the owner has been hurt by the economy and now hes ready to do the hurting

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First Matt and Froy end up on one of the weirdest repos theyve ever encountered when a white cargo van unleashes a wave of workers Then Lou Sonia and Rob go green when they find they learn the Mercedes Benz they are after has been converted to run on biodiesel And finally Matt and Froy cant seem to get a word in edgewise when they encounter a shrieking girl and her biker boyfriend who claim their Mercedes was paid in full Little do our guys know that she was right all along

programme.title: The Crooked Web
programme.desc: A restaurant owner becomes trapped in a plot to return him to Germany for a murder committed in the war

programme.title: The Police Connection
programme.desc: When a “mad bomber” THE RIFLEMAN himself Chuck Connors – as the police computer classifies his suspect type – blows up a high school and a hospital Lieutenant Geronimo Minneli Vince Edwards TV’s BEN CASEY is on his trail He may have a witness in a young mute woman who was raped at the hospital just before the explosion but she is too ashamed to identify her attacker In any case Minneli reasons that it is unlikely that the bomber would stop to rape a woman after planting the bomb and that the rapist and the bomber are likely different people; therefore the rapist himself might be the only one who can help the police catch him Since the police do not know the bomber’s modus operandi but they do know the rapists Minneli starts questioning his past victims

programme.title: Hercules 111
programme.desc: Hercules 111

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Using Jiridian technology scientists create a physical bio surrogates where a human consciousness can be transferred When a surrogate escapes they must find it before it uses its fighting and weapons knowledge

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The Martians attempt to take over a military base that has been used as a secure storage area for much of the information regarding the 1953 invasion In particular they are seeking the location of Martians who are still in hibernation waiting to rejoin the invasion

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Two spoilt rich girls inveigle Will against his will into taking them into the swamp so they can perform a ritual to give them three wishes In the course of teaching them a lesson in humility Will makes a discovery about himself

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an injured escapee from a mental hospital arrives at Will and Tressas door after running into Alec he claims to be an alien on a mission Hes obviously insane - or is he

programme.title: Gamera Vs Barugon War Of The Monsters
programme.desc: After a treacherous expedition to retrieve a giant opal disaster strikes as the opal reveals itself to be an egg which spawns Barugon demon dog from Hell! Armed with a deadly tongue and cold beams Barugon wreaks havoc on Japan Gamera comes to save the day

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The Alphans encounter a miles-long ark from the planet Daria where the inhabitants have a very distinctive class separation

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Boss unveils his new ally His college-educated nephew Hughie Hogg Hughie turns out to be even more corrupt than his uncle proving it with a scheme to frame Uncle Jesse in a car-stripping ring

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Three escaped convicts leave a path of destruction behind them as well as causing friction between Keller and his girlfriend Connie

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Cinnamon poses as the wife of an archaeologist with a serious heart condition He needs to be rescued and an assassination plot needs to be foiled

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A known extortionist claims he is innocent of recent charges Gannon and Friday interrogate him about different incidents and then bring out a surprise device which proves his guilt

programme.title: The Fugitive S3 E10
programme.desc: Stranded in an abandoned town and awaiting help the blind Mrs Gerard Barbara Rush realizes she is with Kimble David Janssen With her husband on the way she delays Kimbles departure hoping his capture will end her husbands obsession and save her marriage

programme.title: BIg Valley
programme.desc: The sociopathic son of a neighbor recently returned from away stirs up serious trouble for the Barclays

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyennes life is saved by a marshal who hires him as a deputy The marshal is headed to the town of South Ford to arrest a man wanted for murder in Kansas The reception they receive is chilly with Cheyenne questioning his decision

programme.title: Jaws of Satan
programme.desc: A preacher whose ancestors were cursed by Druids battles Satan who has taken the form of a huge snake

programme.title: Tarantulas The Deadly Cargo
programme.desc: Townsfolk unite against spiders freed from a crashed planes coffee-bean cargo

programme.title: Prophecy
programme.desc: A government health inspector is dispatched to assess the damage a logging company is causing to a patch of forest claimed by Native Americans and comes face to face with true terror wreaking havoc in the woods

programme.title: Day of the Dead
programme.desc: Trapped in a missile silo a small team of scientists civilians and trigger-happy soldiers battle desperately to ensure the survival of the human race but tension inside the base is reaching breaking-point and the zombies are gathering outside

programme.title: Lion of the Desert
programme.desc: Set during the reign of Mussolini this epic tale revolves around Libyan leader Omar Mukhtar Omar an Arab Muslim rebel takes on the Italian attack which is directed towards conquering Libya

programme.title: Missing in Action 2
programme.desc: Prequel to the first Missing In Action set in the early 1980s it shows the capture of Colonel Braddock during the Vietnam war in the 1970s and his captivity with other American POWs in a brutal prison camp and his plans to escape

programme.title: Firewalker
programme.desc: Two seasoned adventurers recruited by a seemingly psychic woman with a treasure map go on an adventure to recover a horde of gold belonging to an ancient being called the Firewalker

programme.title: The Gladiator
programme.desc: A homicidal maniac is on the loose in Los Angeles killing motorists at random with his death car After losing his brother Jeff to the twisted assassin known as Skull Rick Benton takes it upon himself to hunt down the reckless drivers that fill the streets at night Being a master mechanic Rick spends his time converting his pick-up truck into an armed and dangerous vehicle With speed to take on the fastest car and strength to make sure in a one-on-one situation he will be the only survivor The cops soon find out about the vigilante known only as the Gladiator and do all they can to catch him before his citizens arrests go one step too far

programme.title: The Hills have Eyes
programme.desc: On the way to California a family has the misfortune to have their car break down in an area closed to the public and inhabited by violent savages ready to attack

programme.title: City of the Living Dead
programme.desc: A psychic and a journalist head to Dunvich to prevent an apocalypse after a priest commits suicide in a cemetery somehow causing the gates of hell to open and allowing the dead to rise

programme.title: Killdozer
programme.desc: Construction workers Clint Walker Carl Betz Neville Brand battle an unmanned bulldozer energized by an alien force

programme.title: Cheerleader Camp
programme.desc: A cheerleader Betsy Russell her boyfriend Leif Garrett colleagues and a team mascot Lucinda Dickey attend a competition spoiled by murder

programme.title: House II The Second Story
programme.desc: A man Arye Gross and his friend Jonathan Stark exhume an ancestor Royal Dano in the house where his parents were killed

programme.title: Hard Knocks

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

programme.title: The Heart Hayes Interview
programme.desc: Join me as I sit down with the beautiful actress Heart Hayes Hear how keeping her standards high is the only option Also in the episode I chat it up with former Supreme Susaye Green And Businessman Mr Johnboy Watts

programme.title: The Sherard Show on location at the Comedy Chateau
programme.desc: Join me live on location where I chop it up with comedy icon Mr Mike Marino As well as surprise guest Mr Sean Kanan and more!

programme.title: The Sherard Show Celebrates Sherards 50th Birthday
programme.desc: Join me as I celebrate a milestone in life as well as on the show Featuring special guests Felix Mcnulty Jennifer Santos and the beautiful Irina Voornina

programme.title: The Mel Carter Interview
programme.desc: The last of the great ones Mr Mel Carter returns to the show to speak about Sam Cooke Dean Martin and one person youll never believe he worked with

programme.title: The Kendall Ferguson Interview
programme.desc: The hilarious Chicago Comedian Kendall Ferguson returns to the show to talk about his new book and why he needs to stop stealing

programme.title: The Florence La Rue Interview
programme.desc: I never really thought I could sing Hear in her own words how singing was the furtherest thing from her mind

programme.title: The Brian Stanley Interview
programme.desc: The master writer and producer Mr Brian Stanley returns to the Sherard Show to talk about his upcoming film and play

programme.title: The Fred Williamson Exclusive Interview
programme.desc: From pro football star to Hollywood icon Join me as I chop it up with the legendary Mr Fred Williamson
